svg.title: Two-layer orchestration: router LLM delegates to inner LLM tools and compute tools
svg.desc: An orchestrator LLM at the top is locked to tool-call output only. It routes to either inner LLM tools for extraction and rendering, or deterministic compute tools. Stage-bleeding is eliminated by construction.

g.text: Output locked to tool calls — cannot emit prose

svg.text: Each prompt: one task, one schema
